Our Dare to Dream mentorship program pairs adults with youth for a full year of support—you'd meet twice a month, one-on-one, to build a real relationship and help them grow. We handle the background check (it's free!) and provide training so you know what to expect. It's a meaningful way to make a direct impact on a young person's life.

Our Dare to Dream mentorship program pairs adults with youth for a meaningful one-year commitment—you'd meet with your mentee twice a month and help them build life skills, confidence, and connections. We handle the background check (no cost to you), and it's a chance to make a real difference in a young person's life!

Our Dare to Dream mentorship program pairs adults with youth for a full year of support — you'd meet twice a month to build a real relationship and help them grow. It's a meaningful way to make a direct impact on a young person's life, and we cover all the background check costs. Interested in learning more or thinking about becoming a mentor?

Our Dare to Dream mentorship program pairs you with a young person for a year of twice-monthly meetings—it's a real relationship where you help them build confidence, explore their interests, and navigate life. We handle the matching, provide training, and cover the background check cost. It's a meaningful way to invest in a local youth's future!

I'd love to help you explore! We have two main programs — **Love Box** (supporting families with essentials) and **Dare to Dream** (youth mentorship). Rather than dump everything at once, what matters most to you — helping families directly, or mentoring a young person?

I'd love to help, but that's a lot to cover at once! 🙂 We have two main programs—Love Box (family support) and Dare to Dream (youth mentorship)—and each has different ways to get involved. What draws you most: helping families, mentoring young people, or learning about both?

I'd love to help, but that's a lot to cover in a chat! 😊 We have two main programs — **Love Box** (supporting families with care packages and mentorship) and **Dare to Dream** (pairing youth with adult mentors). The best way to explore both is to attend one of our monthly discovery sessions where you can ask anything and meet the team.
